title: Western Blot Analysis and Immunoprecipitation Assay
author: Marzia Ognibene
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bgecjtaw
materials: Protein content is evaluated by bicinchoninic acid assay (BCA Protein assay kit by Thermo Fisher) in a spectrophotometer.
Proteins are visualized by enhanced chemiluminescence (ECL) detection, through the Bio-Rad ChemiDoc instrument. Signal intensity was measured by densitometry using the Bio-Rad Image Lab 6.0 software.

steps.title: Cells are washed in cold PBS...
steps.instruction: Cells are washed in cold PBS and lysed on ice in a buffer containing 1.6 mM NaH2PO4, 8.6 mM Na2HPO4, 1% Triton X-100, 0.1% SDS; 0.1% NaCl, 0.5% NaDoc, 2 mM AEBSF, 20 mg/mL each of aprotinin and leupeptin.

steps.title: Cell lysates are centrifuged in a...
steps.instruction: Cell lysates are centrifuged in a microfuge at maximum speed for 10 min to eliminate debris.

steps.title: Lysates (100 µg each) are subjected...
steps.instruction: Lysates (100 µg each) are subjected to SDS-PAGE electrophoresis and transferred to PVDF membrane.

steps.title: For the IMMUNOPRECIPITATION ASSAY, cells are...
steps.instruction: For the IMMUNOPRECIPITATION ASSAY, cells are lysed in a buffer containing 20 mM Tris-HCl, 1% Triton X-100, 10% Glycerol, 2 mM AEBSF, 20 mg/mL each of aprotinin and leupeptin.

steps.title: Lysates (1000 µg) are incubated overnight...
steps.instruction: Lysates (1000 µg) are incubated overnight at 4˚C with the desired antibody under constant rotation.

steps.title: Gammabind G-Sepharose (40 µl) is added...
steps.instruction: Gammabind G-Sepharose (40 µl) is added to each sample and let rotate for 1 hour and 30 min.

steps.title: Samples are washed three times with...
steps.instruction: Samples are washed three times with the lysis buffer in a microfuge at 4300 g for 1 min.

steps.title: After eliminating the last supernatant, samples...
steps.instruction: After eliminating the last supernatant, samples are eluted in 40 µl of 1x Laemmli’s buffer, subjected to SDS-PAGE and transferred to PVDF membrane.

steps.title: PVDF membrane is incubated in blocking...
steps.instruction: PVDF membrane is incubated in blocking buffer (4% nonfat milk in T-TBS -Tris Buffer Solution 1x with 0,05%Tween) for 2 hr at room temperature.

steps.title: Membrane is incubated in primary antibody...
steps.instruction: Membrane is incubated in primary antibody diluted in 0,5%BSA in T-TBS, overnight at 4°C.

steps.title: Membrane is washed in T-TBS, 5 times, 5 min each
steps.instruction: Membrane is washed in T-TBS, 5 times, 5 min each.

steps.title: Membrane is incubated in HRP-conjugated secondary...
steps.instruction: Membrane is incubated in HRP-conjugated secondary antibody diluted in 0,5%BSA in T-TBS, 2 hr, at room temperature.

steps.title: Membrane is washed in T-TBS, 5 times, 5 min each
steps.instruction: Membrane is washed in T-TBS, 5 times, 5 min each.
